Title: Neon Cyberpunk Cityscape Astronaut Hoodie
Description:
Step into the vibrant glow of a futuristic metropolis with this striking Cyberpunk Astronaut hoodie. Featuring an eye-catching neon cityscape illustration, this design captures the mood of retro-futurism and synthetic dreamscapes.

The hoodie is printed with a bold, glowing pink and blue palette, giving you the perfect aesthetic piece for enthusiasts of synthwave, vaporwave, and cyberpunk culture. It's a wearable piece of art that makes a powerful statement.

Features & Benefits:

  • Vibrant Design: High-quality print showcasing a lone astronaut set against a dramatic neon skyline.
  • Comfortable Fit: Designed with a classic hooded sweatshirt structure for all-day comfort.
  • Versatile Style: Perfect for festivals, casual outings, creative gatherings, or adding a bold edge to your streetwear rotation.
  • Material Feel: Crafted from soft, durable materials that feel great and maintain color wash after wash.

This makes an excellent gift for friends who appreciate unique graphic apparel, sci-fi themes, or vivid, retro aesthetics.
